stemHtml: How should ATC transmit the RVR for runway 16?

options.a: RVR runway 16 touchdown ... metres, mid-point ... metres, stop end ... metres.
options.b: RVR at the beginning of runway 16 is ... metres.
options.c: RVR runway 16 ... metres diagonal ... metres diagonal ... metres.
options.d: Transmissometer values are ... metres and ... metres.
